[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 11000001 3
2 10001111 5
3 11000000 2
4 10101010 4
5 11001001 4
6 00011110 4
7 11111111 a

23 01000000 1

56 00000000 a
67 11111110 7
70 00000000 a
